kernel_logic: Trust is a binary vulnerability to be eliminated. System architecture must assume a breached environment where every packet, user, and device is untrusted by default. Logical micro-segmentation and explicit identity validation are foundational requirements.

decision_gates.if: An access request originates from either an internal OR external network
decision_gates.then: Execute complete authentication, authorization, and posture assessment before granting least privilege access.

decision_gates.if: A session is active and persistent
decision_gates.then: Perform continuous verification of identity and integrity; terminate access immediately upon policy violation.

decision_gates.if: A new workload or microservice is deployed
decision_gates.then: Implement micro-segmentation at the application layer to prevent lateral movement.

semantic_anchor: Total elimination of implicit trust in distributed environments.
